title: Reasoning blocks in a turn emit avp.reasoning_emitted with text + signature, ordered before text_emitted
description: When a model turn contains reasoning/thinking blocks (Anthropic extended thinking, OpenAI o-series reasoning, etc.), the agent MUST emit one avp.reasoning_emitted event per block carrying avp.reasoning.text and (if the provider gives one) avp.reasoning.signature. The events MUST come AFTER avp.model_turn_ended and BEFORE avp.text_emitted — the wire reconstructs as 'thought, then spoke'. Distinct from text_emitted so consumers can collapse / redact chain-of-thought from displays without losing it from the audit log.
